title: GitHub + AI precautions bound to Z-Sanctuary communications flows
description: Canonical requirement rows for tooling, operators, and future automation. Run npm run comms:github-ai to emit data/reports/z_github_ai_comms_manifest.json. Review quarterly or when GitHub/Copilot/Spark/Models/Actions change materially.

instructional_docs.role: Human + AI readable precautions and evolution notes

data_sources.role: Canonical GitHub login and email for ecosystem
Project paths and dashboard URLs for comms surfaces
Canonical Extras & Tools folder under pc_root — ecosystem + Z-FPSMC awareness; hub Folder Manager does not apply there
Registered modules — avoid duplicating work already manifested

precaution_themes.summary: Never commit PATs, SSH private keys, OAuth tokens, or vault payloads to any repo or AI chat.
precaution_themes.comms_binding: Z-Bridge logs and guardian reports must never echo secrets; CI logs must mask secrets.

precaution_themes.summary: GitHub Copilot, Spark, and web AI are assistive — hub truth stays in PC/NAS, manifests, and approved docs.
precaution_themes.comms_binding: State reports and registry remain authority; external AI output is provisional until reviewed.

precaution_themes.summary: Use one verified GitHub identity and email per docs; match git config on each machine.
precaution_themes.comms_binding: data/z_ecosystem_github_identity.json + AGENTS.md for any AI touching GitHub context.

precaution_themes.summary: Workflows use repo Secrets only; pin actions versions where practical; review new permissions.
precaution_themes.comms_binding: verify:ci and release gate remain separate from hosting 'production' semantics.

precaution_themes.summary: When GitHub ships new AI or API features, update this JSON + master MD and re-run comms:github-ai.
precaution_themes.comms_binding: Manifest report timestamps prove propagation through the comms-flow toolchain.
